bird.name: Talaud bush-hen
bird.summary: The Talaud bush-hen (Amaurornis magnirostris) is a vulnerable waterbird in the rail and crake family. It is a recently described species fr…

relations.subject: Talaud bush-hen
relations.evidence: There are two protected areas totalling 21,800 hectares, but there has been no management and these areas are threatened by agricultural encroachment, illegal logging, and fire
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
